description: Intent resolution: scheduled aggregation is wf-shaped, root-cause cross-referencing is agentic tool-use.

conversation.text: Every Sunday, take last week's customer feedback tickets: for each, have an agent cross-reference our docs and past tickets to identify the root cause, then aggregate findings into a report and email leadership.

intentExpectation.rationale: Scheduled + deterministic aggregation is wf-shaped; root-cause cross-referencing is agentic tool-use → agent embedded.
